commands.summary: [AC-1] iOS initialization blocked on Windows because the installed Tauri CLI exposes no ios subcommand.
[AC-1] CLI help listed android commands but no ios commands on this Windows host.
[AC-9] Confirmed current Tauri 2 app environment before iOS initialization attempt.
[AC-9] Confirmed only Windows and Linux Rust targets are installed locally; no iOS target is available on this host.
[AC-4] Content validation passed for A+, Network+, and Security+ bundled banks before iOS runtime proof.
[AC-4] Strict objective coverage validation passed: 3 certifications, 19 domains, 770 questions, 135 flashcards, 28 PBQs, and 150 lessons.
[AC-6] Accessibility validation passed after iOS safe-area and mobile CSS hardening.
[AC-9] Unit tests passed after iOS repo-foundation changes.
[AC-9] TypeScript and Vite production build passed after iOS repo-foundation changes.

[AC-9] Governance validation still fails on the repo-wide preflight-marker requirement affecting active, blocked, and completed work items; 218 now has the same pre-existing marker class after being moved to blocked.

environment.process_note: Repository-side iOS foundation is present; iOS target generation, Simulator/device launch, offline-content runtime proof, persistence proof, backup document/share handoff, and IPA output remain blocked until work resumes on macOS with Xcode.
